tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are textual/AST inspection rather than behavioral. test_description_in_error_types parses the source and counts TSPropertySignature nodes. test_error_mapping_copies_description parses the AST looking for a specific object property pattern. test_new_generators_defined and test_new_strategies_registered parse the AST for function declarations. Only test_errorsMatch_rejects_different_descriptions actually executes the function. The build/lint tests execute but are pass_to_pass tests.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (errorsMatch behavioral test, description type check, error mapping check, generators check, strategies registration) cannot be satisfied by stub implementations since they check for specific code structures and behavioral outcomes that don't exist in the original code.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution is in /workspace/react (same container) as solve.sh is copied there. The agent could read the solution directory if it exists. Also, since tests mostly do AST inspection of the source file, an agent could grep the test file to discover exactly what patterns are expected (e.g., 'detail.description', specific generator names) and produce them without understanding the bug.
